refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle by optimizing load handling, travel efficiency, and dump operations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level. Decomposing it into sub-functions targeting each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows focused design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 under representative duty cycles and site conditions, verifying each sub-function's contribution to overall cycle time.

candidate_dps: Optimized travel path planning and control
selected_dp.selected_dp: Automated load handling system; Optimized travel path planning and control; Efficient dump mechanism control

potential_sources: Load handling affects travel start time
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by cycle phase but require coordination via control logic to avoid timing conflicts.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate site and duty cycle data for optimization
Risk of sub-optimization if phases are optimized independently without system-level coordination
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding a coordination DP to manage phase transitions and timing synchronization.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components responsible for load handling, travel, and dump operations

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends cycle time and status data to NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle receives operational commands from NGHE Solution or Teleoperation

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends safety alerts to Safety Services

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle contains core physical DPs; low diffusion as functions are localized.
NGHE Solution manages coordination and monitoring; moderate diffusion due to cross-cutting control.
Teleoperation mainly supports remote control, less involved in cycle time optimization.
Safety Services focused on safety alerts, minimal containment of cycle time functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module best encapsulates the physical DPs for cycle time optimization, minimizing diffusion and enabling clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution for coordination logic
Risk of interface complexity if coordination is not well defined
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts between Vehicle and NGHE Solution for coordination and monitoring.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement is clear and sub-FRs are logically decomposed; selected DPs address each sub-FR with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Coordination logic diffusion between Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module effectively contains physical DPs; NGHE Solution handles coordination, requiring well-defined interfaces.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring cycle times and monitoring telemetry data from Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of physical functions to Vehicle and coordination to NGHE Solution.

recommended_revisions: Add coordination DP and corresponding IM responsibilities
Clarify interface definitions between Vehicle and NGHE Solution

decision.justification: While decomposition and assignments are sound, coordination DP and clearer interface definitions are needed to reduce diffusion risks and improve architectural clarity.

revise.why: To introduce coordination DP managing phase transitions and timing synchronization.

assumptions: Site and duty cycle data are accurate and available
Vehicle module can encapsulate physical DPs effectively
open_risks: Coordination logic diffusion between Vehicle and NGHE Solution
Interface complexity leading to integration challenges
evidence_needed: Performance data validating cycle time improvements per sub-FR
